command:
sshpass -p 'M3gh@n!97&' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.118 '
set -e
echo "=== INSTALLING SSH KEY ==="
mkdir -p ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh
echo "ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIKwnvuMIp7WDtCaT1d4QMLMX0GNiD+w7ENaqdcCY49W1 n8n-bridge" >> ~/.ssh/authorized_keys
sort -u ~/.ssh/authorized_keys -o ~/.ssh/authorized_keys
chmod 600 ~/.ssh/authorized_keys
echo OK_KEY

echo "=== SUDO ==="
echo "jose ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL" | sudo tee /etc/sudoers.d/jose-nopasswd > /dev/null
sudo chmod 440 /etc/sudoers.d/jose-nopasswd
echo OK_SUDO

echo "=== HOSTNAME ==="
sudo hostnamectl set-hostname vm-ecosystem
echo OK_HOSTNAME

echo "=== DNS FIX ==="
if ! grep -q "nohook resolv.conf" /etc/dhcpcd.conf 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "nohook resolv.conf" | sudo tee -a /etc/dhcpcd.conf > /dev/null
fi
echo "nameserver 8.8.8.8" | sudo tee /etc/resolv.conf > /dev/null
echo "nameserver 8.8.4.4" | sudo tee -a /etc/resolv.conf > /dev/null
echo "nameserver 1.1.1.1" | sudo tee -a /etc/resolv.conf > /dev/null
echo OK_DNS

echo "=== PACKAGES ==="
sudo apt-get update -qq 2>/dev/null | tail -1
sudo apt-get install -y -qq git python3 python3-pip curl 2>/dev/null | tail -3
echo OK_PACKAGES

echo "=== AUDIT DIR ==="
sudo mkdir -p /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance
sudo chown -R jose:jose /opt/docker
echo OK_AUDIT_DIR

echo "=== MORENO-AI DIR ==="
sudo mkdir -p /opt/moreno-ai
sudo chown jose:jose /opt/moreno-ai
echo OK_MORENO_DIR

echo "=== VERSIONS ==="
git --version
python3 --version
hostname
echo ALL_PHASE_A_DONE
' 2>&1
